block_01: Some say that trading is about passion, and to a certain degree they are, of course, right. It is virtually impossible to dedicate yourself to something that you are not interested in. Therefore, you have to be passionate about what you do, whether it is trading or anything else.
block_02: On the other hand, for tangible results in trading discipline is more important than passion. It is discipline that helps you open and close deals at the right moment, get valuable insights from analysis, and trade in a professional and productive way.
block_03: Learn how to improve your discipline in 5 simple steps and watch your trading results improve!
